PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $65,343,309Details
International Box Office $136,395,983
Worldwide Box Office $201,739,292
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,897,029
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $799,816
Total $2,696,845
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When a magical meteor crash lands in Adventure City, it gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into The Mighty Pups! For Skye, the smallest member of the team, her new powers are a dream come true. But things take a turn for the worse when the pups’ arch rival Humdinger breaks out of jail and teams up with Victoria Vance, a meteor-obsessed mad scientist, to steal the superpowers and turn themselves into supervillains. With the fate of Adventure City hanging in the balance, the Mighty Pups have to stop the supervillains before it’s too late, and Skye will need to learn that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$22,764,354 (34.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.87 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:32.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,989 opening theaters/4,027 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $71,435,645

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 29th, 2023 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: September 21st, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
September 21st, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide), released as PAW Patrol: The Mighty Movie (ПАТРУЛЬ ЛАП: МОГУЧИЙ ФИЛЬМ) (Russia (CIS))
September 28th, 2023 (Wide), released as Psići u ophodnji: Moćan film (Croatia)
September 28th, 2023 (Wide) (Malaysia)
Video Release: October 31st, 2023 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for mild action/peril.
(Rating bulletin 2790 (cert #54250), 7/5/2023)
Running Time: 87 minutes
Franchise: Paw Patrol
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (country): Canada
Plot point: Good vs. Evil, Origin Story, Talking Animals
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Spin Master, Nickelodeon Films, Paramount Pictures
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

When a magical meteor crash lands in Adventure City, it gives the PAW Patrol pups superpowers, transforming them into The Mighty Pups! For Skye, the smallest member of the team, her new powers are a dream come true. But things take a turn for the worse when the pups’ arch rival Humdinger breaks out of jail and teams up with Victoria Vance, a meteor-obsessed mad scientist, to steal the superpowers and turn themselves into supervillains. With the fate of Adventure City hanging in the balance, the Mighty Pups have to stop the supervillains before it’s too late, and Skye will need to learn that even the smallest pup can make the biggest difference.
